name_cn:
『Burberry』
🔥🔥Burberry check leather wallet, comes with chain-strap leather shoulder strap. Can be used as a small bag on its own, or as a wallet inside a daily bag. 👍High quality, fine craftsmanship 💋Real photos 📷, 🆔🆔40609791 Black! Size 21cm*12cm*3cm
